articles.summary: Google DeepMind is transforming the mouse pointer into a context-aware AI partner. Move beyond the friction of traditional prompting with intuitive AI collaboration in Chrome and beyond.

articles.summary: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

articles.summary: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.

articles.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more
articles.summary: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro, which unlocks longer tracks with structural awareness. We’re also bringing Lyria to more Google products and surfaces.

articles.summary: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.

articles.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.

articles.summary: Our latest image generation model offers advanced world knowledge, production ready specs, subject consistency and more, all at Flash speed.

articles.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: A smarter model for your most complex tasks
articles.summary: 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough.

articles.title: A new way to express yourself: Gemini can now create music
articles.summary: The Gemini app now features our most advanced music generation model Lyria 3, empowering anyone to make 30-second tracks using text or images.

articles.summary: D4RT: Unified, efficient 4D reconstruction and tracking up to 300x faster than prior methods.

articles.summary: Our latest Veo update generates lively, dynamic clips that feel natural and engaging — and supports vertical video generation.

articles.summary: The new AI model delivers more efficient, more accurate and higher-resolution global weather predictions.

articles.title: SIMA 2: An Agent that Plays, Reasons, and Learns With You in Virtual 3D Worlds
articles.summary: Introducing SIMA 2, a Gemini-powered AI agent that can think, understand, and take actions in interactive environments.

articles.title: Teaching AI to see the world more like we do
articles.summary: Our new paper analyzes the important ways AI systems organize the visual world differently from humans.

articles.title: How AI is giving Northern Ireland teachers time back
articles.summary: A six-month long pilot program with the Northern Ireland Education Authority’s C2k initiative found that integrating Gemini and other generative AI tools saved participating teachers an average of 10 hours per week.

articles.title: Mapping, modeling, and understanding nature with AI
articles.summary: AI models can help map species, protect forests and listen to birds around the world

articles.title: Accelerating discovery with the AI for Math Initiative
articles.summary: The initiative brings together some of the world's most prestigious research institutions to pioneer the use of AI in mathematical research.

articles.title: T5Gemma: A new collection of encoder-decoder Gemma models
articles.summary: Introducing T5Gemma, a new collection of encoder-decoder LLMs.

articles.title: MedGemma: Our most capable open models for health AI development
articles.summary: We’re announcing new multimodal models in the MedGemma collection, our most capable open models for health AI development.

articles.title: Introducing Gemma 3n: The developer guide
articles.summary: Gemma 3n is designed for the developer community that helped shape Gemma.

articles.title: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite is now ready for scaled production use
articles.summary: Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite, previously in preview, is now stable and generally available. This cost-efficient model provides high quality in a small size, and includes 2.5 family features like a 1 million-token context window and multimodality.

articles.title: Behind “ANCESTRA”: combining Veo with live-action filmmaking
articles.summary: We partnered with Darren Aronofsky, Eliza McNitt and a team of more than 200 people to make a film using Veo and live-action filmmaking.

articles.title: AlphaEarth Foundations helps map our planet in unprecedented detail
articles.summary: New AI model integrates petabytes of Earth observation data to generate a unified data representation that revolutionizes global mapping and monitoring

articles.title: Exploring the context of online images with Backstory
articles.summary: New experimental AI tool helps people explore the context and origin of images seen online.

articles.title: Advanced version of Gemini with Deep Think officially achieves gold-medal standard at the International Mathematical Olympiad
articles.summary: The International Mathematical Olympiad (“IMO”) is the world’s most prestigious competition for young mathematicians, and has been held annually since 1959. Each country taking part is represented by six elite, pre-university mathematicians who compete to solve six exceptionally difficult problems in algebra, combinatorics, geometry, and number theory.

articles.title: Aeneas transforms how historians connect the past
articles.summary: Introducing the first model for contextualizing ancient inscriptions, designed to help historians better interpret, attribute and restore fragmentary texts.

articles.title: Genie 3: A new frontier for world models
articles.summary: Genie 3 can generate dynamic worlds that you can navigate in real time at 24 frames per second, retaining consistency for a few minutes at a resolution of 720p.

articles.title: How AI is helping advance the science of bioacoustics to save endangered species
articles.summary: Our new Perch model helps conservationists analyze audio faster to protect endangered species, from Hawaiian honeycreepers to coral reefs.

articles.title: Using AI to perceive the universe in greater depth
articles.summary: Using AI to perceive the universe in greater depth

articles.title: Gemini achieves gold-medal level at the International Collegiate Programming Contest World Finals
articles.summary: Gemini 2.5 Deep Think achieves breakthrough performance at the world’s most prestigious computer programming competition, demonstrating a profound leap in abstract problem solving.

articles.title: Discovering new solutions to century-old problems in fluid dynamics
articles.summary: Our new method could help mathematicians leverage AI techniques to tackle long-standing challenges in mathematics, physics and engineering.

articles.title: Strengthening our Frontier Safety Framework
articles.summary: We’re strengthening the Frontier Safety Framework (FSF) to help identify and mitigate severe risks from advanced AI models.

articles.title: Gemini Robotics 1.5 brings AI agents into the physical world
articles.summary: We’re powering an era of physical agents — enabling robots to perceive, plan, think, use tools and act to better solve complex, multi-step tasks.

articles.title: Introducing CodeMender: an AI agent for code security
articles.summary: Using advanced AI to fix critical software vulnerabilities

articles.title: Bringing AI to the next generation of fusion energy
articles.summary: We’re partnering with Commonwealth Fusion Systems (CFS) to bring clean, safe, limitless fusion energy closer to reality.

articles.title: Try Deep Think in the Gemini app
articles.summary: We're rolling out Deep Think in the Gemini app for Google AI Ultra subscribers, and we're giving select mathematicians access to the full version of the Gemini 2.5 Deep Think model entered into the IMO competition.

articles.title: Rethinking how we measure AI intelligence
articles.summary: Game Arena is a new, open-source platform for rigorous evaluation of AI models. It allows for head-to-head comparison of frontier systems in environments with clear winning conditions.

articles.title: Introducing Gemma 3 270M: The compact model for hyper-efficient AI
articles.summary: Today, we're adding a new, highly specialized tool to the Gemma 3 toolkit: Gemma 3 270M, a compact, 270-million parameter model.

articles.title: Image editing in Gemini just got a major upgrade
articles.summary: Transform images in amazing new ways with updated native image editing in the Gemini app.

articles.title: VaultGemma: The world's most capable differentially private LLM
articles.summary: We introduce VaultGemma, the most capable model trained from scratch with differential privacy.

articles.title: Introducing the Gemini 2.5 Computer Use model
articles.summary: Available in preview via the API, our Computer Use model is a specialized model built on Gemini 2.5 Pro’s capabilities to power agents that can interact with user interfaces.

articles.title: Introducing Veo 3.1 and advanced creative capabilities
articles.summary: We’re rolling out significant updates to Veo that give people even more creative control.

articles.title: How a Gemma model helped discover a new potential cancer therapy pathway
articles.summary: We’re launching a new 27 billion parameter foundation model for single-cell analysis built on the Gemma family of open models.

articles.title: AlphaGenome: AI for better understanding the genome
articles.summary: Introducing a new, unifying DNA sequence model that advances regulatory variant-effect prediction and promises to shed new light on genome function — now available via API.

articles.title: Gemini Robotics On-Device brings AI to local robotic devices
articles.summary: We’re introducing an efficient, on-device robotics model with general-purpose dexterity and fast task adaptation.

articles.title: Gemini 2.5: Updates to our family of thinking models
articles.summary: Explore the latest Gemini 2.5 model updates with enhanced performance and accuracy: Gemini 2.5 Pro now stable, Flash generally available, and the new Flash-Lite in preview.

articles.title: We’re expanding our Gemini 2.5 family of models
articles.summary: Gemini 2.5 Flash and Pro are now generally available, and we’re introducing 2.5 Flash-Lite, our most cost-efficient and fastest 2.5 model yet.

articles.title: How we're supporting better tropical cyclone prediction with AI
articles.summary: We’re launching Weather Lab, featuring our experimental cyclone predictions, and we’re partnering with the U.S. National Hurricane Center to support their forecasts and warnings this cyclone season.

articles.title: Advanced audio dialog and generation with Gemini 2.5
articles.summary: Gemini 2.5 has new capabilities in AI-powered audio dialog and generation.

articles.title: Gemini 2.5: Our most intelligent models are getting even better
articles.summary: Gemini 2.5 Pro continues to be loved by developers as the best model for coding, and 2.5 Flash is getting even better with a new update. We’re bringing new capabilities to our models, including Deep Think, an experimental enhanced reasoning mode for 2.5 Pro.

articles.title: Fuel your creativity with new generative media models and tools
articles.summary: Introducing Veo 3 and Imagen 4, and a new tool for filmmaking called Flow.

articles.title: Our vision for building a universal AI assistant
articles.summary: We’re extending Gemini to become a world model that can make plans and imagine new experiences by simulating aspects of the world.

articles.title: SynthID Detector — a new portal to help identify AI-generated content
articles.summary: Learn about the new SynthID Detector portal we announced at I/O to help people understand how the content they see online was generated.
